api: When I Work REST API v2 (https://apidocs.wheniwork.com/)
scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (users, locations, positions, shifts); When I Work's write endpoints (shift create/update/delete, user invite) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented time-off requests; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented availability records; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented shift creation; Pass B capability expansion
shift deletion not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
credential-exchange/session endpoint, not a syncable object stream
